scripts.semgrep: mkdir -p /tmp/www-ai-semgrep-home && env -u HTTP_PROXY -u HTTPS_PROXY -u ALL_PROXY HOME=/tmp/www-ai-semgrep-home semgrep scan --config .semgrep/ci.yml --config .semgrep/architecture.yml --exclude '**/.next/**' --exclude '**/.source/**' --error --metrics=off apps packages scripts
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run docs:check && node scripts/check-boundaries.mjs && npm run build && npm run semgrep
